name: How long do I have to report my work neck injury in Utah before it's too late?
description: 180 days in Utah to notify employer; don't wait.

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report my work neck injury in Utah before it's too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: 180 days in Utah to notify employer; don't wait.
acceptedAnswer.description: **In Utah, you must notify your employer within 180 days of the injury; claims filed after one year are generally barred.** Timely notice is critical for neck injury claims.[4] Key factors: Clock starts from injury or symptom awareness; exceptions for good cause like delayed diagnosis; Idaho has similar 60-day/1-year rules. Document notice date, follow up in writing. Missing deadlines often denies benefits, so act fast.
